section.div: Favorites genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Supernatural, Drama

div.div: Based on the hit manga of the same name, the Record of Ragnarok saga continues with 13 one-on-one battles for the survival of humanity, pitting gods against humans from across the world. Witness the fateful seventh battle: the final fight to break the 3-3 tie between the gods and humans. (Source: Netflix)
